reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Sanitarios siempre impecables. Tienen servicio de comidas rápidas,  kiosko y nuevos pata niños.  Hay descuentos para socios del Automóvil club argentino.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Restrooms are always spotless. They have a fast-food service, a kiosk, and new children's play areas. There are discounts for members of the Argentine Automobile Club.

reviews.comment:
Los baños más limpios que conozco.... El personal es amable sean los playeros como los del drugstore. El tostado árabe de jamón y queso un manjar. Recomiendo totalmente parar en ésta estación si haces autopista rosario-bs as

(Translated by Google)
The cleanest restrooms I've ever seen... The staff is friendly, both those at the gas station and those at the convenience store. The ham and cheese toastie is delicious. I highly recommend stopping at this station if you're traveling on the Rosario-Buenos Aires highway.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRLUxDbFlBEAE
